metadata.scheme_name: Supply of School Uniform and Tie belt to other than SC/ST Boys Students of Std I to VIII
metadata.state: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu

raw_data.details: Provision of a complete uniform (shirt, pants, tie, belt) to General categorey boys of classes I to VIII studying in government schools. Standardized uniform scheme to promote discipline, removing social distinctions based on attire.
raw_data.benefits: 1. Fosters a sense of identity, equality and discipline among students. 2. Significantly reduces school absenteeism and improves performance by eliminating the financial barrier of purchasing clothes. 3. Promotes regular school attendance by supporting foundational needs
raw_data.eligibility: 1. The applicant should be a student. 2. The applicant should be studying in class 1st to 8th. 3. The applicant should be studying in a government school in UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineNo separate application is required. Eligible students enrolled in government schools are automatically covered under the scheme.

To know more please visit Check EligibilityDadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & DiuSupply of School Uniform and Tie belt to other than SC/ST Boys Students of Std I to VIIIEducationFree Tie BeltFree UniformDetailsProvision of a complete uniform (shirt, pants, tie, belt) to General categorey boys of classes I to VIII studying in government schools. Standardized uniform scheme to promote discipline, removing social distinctions based on attire. Benefits1. Fosters a sense of identity, equality and discipline among students. 2. Significantly reduces school absenteeism and improves performance by eliminating the financial barrier of purchasing clothes. 3. Promotes regular school attendance by supporting foundational needs Eligibility1. The applicant should be a student. 2. The applicant should be studying in class 1st to 8th. 3. The applicant should be studying in a government school in UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu. Application ProcessOfflineNo separate application is required. Eligible students enrolled in government schools are automatically covered under the scheme. Documents RequiredNo Documents requiredFrequently Asked QuestionsWhich students are eligible? Students from Classes 1 to 8 studying in government schools. How many uniforms are provided? Two pairs of uniforms per student. Is the scheme for both boys and girls? No, it benefits all general category boys. What is the purpose of this scheme? To encourage regular attendance and continuity in education among school students. raw_data.scheme_name: Supply of School Uniform and Tie belt to other than SC/ST Boys Students of Std I to VIII
raw_data.state: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu

faqs.question: Which students are eligible?
faqs.answer: Students from Classes 1 to 8 studying in government schools.

faqs.question: How many uniforms are provided?
faqs.answer: Two pairs of uniforms per student.

faqs.question: Is the scheme for both boys and girls?
faqs.answer: No, it benefits all general category boys.

faqs.question: What is the purpose of this scheme?
faqs.answer: To encourage regular attendance and continuity in education among school students.
